state_item.subject: Slow query report - week of April 21
state_item.body:
Top 5 slow queries this week:
1. users_search (avg 3.2s, 400 calls/day) - missing index on email_normalized
2. order_history (avg 1.8s) - full table scan on large partition
3. analytics_rollup (avg 5.1s) - expected, batch job
4. permission_check (avg 0.9s, 12K calls/day) - nested subquery
5. audit_log_insert (avg 0.7s) - WAL congestion during peak

Action items assigned in Jira.
